title: thelypteris boridensis
intro: Thelypteris boridensis is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae, commonly known as the boridensis fern. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its use as an anti-inflammatory and antibacterial agent. The health benefits of Thelypteris boridensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, Thelypteris boridensis can be used to make teas, infusions, and poultices, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
